metadata.description: Zero-dependency security scanner for AI agent ecosystems

plugins.name: repo-forensics
plugins.description: Offline security scanner for AI-agent repos, skills, plugins, and MCP servers. 20 scanners detect prompt injection, MCP tool poisoning, credential exposure, malicious lifecycle hooks, package IOCs, CVEs, CISA KEV exposure, and post-incident traces. Zero dependencies. Zero telemetry.
